items.title: Verus: A Practical Foundation for Systems Verification.
items.abstract: Formal verification is a promising approach to eliminate bugs at compile time, before they ship. Indeed, our community has verified a wide variety of system software. However, much of this success has required heroic developer effort, relied on bespoke logics for individual domains, or sacrificed expressiveness for powerful proof automation.
items.abstract_zh: 形式验证是一种很有前途的方法，可以在发布之前的编译时消除错误。事实上，我们的社区已经验证了各种各样的系统软件。然而，这种成功在很大程度上需要开发人员付出巨大的努力，依赖于各个领域的定制逻辑，或者为了强大的证明自动化而牺牲表达能力。

items.title: Sesame: Practical End-to-End Privacy Compliance with Policy Containers and Privacy Regions.
items.abstract: Web applications are governed by privacy policies, but developers lack practical abstractions to ensure that their code actually abides by these policies. This leads to frequent oversights, bugs, and costly privacy violations.
items.abstract_zh: Web 应用程序受隐私策略的约束，但开发人员缺乏实用的抽象来确保他们的代码实际上遵守这些策略。这会导致频繁的疏忽、错误和代价高昂的隐私侵犯。

items.title: Modular Verification of Secure and Leakage-Free Systems: From Application Specification to Circuit-Level Implementation.
items.abstract: Parfait is a framework for proving that an implementation of a hardware security module (HSM) leaks nothing more than what is mandated by an application specification. Parfait proofs cover the software and the hardware of an HSM, which catches bugs above the cycle-level digital circuit abstraction, including timing side channels. Parfait's contribution is a scalable approach to proving security and non-leakage by using intermediate levels of abstraction and relating them with transitive information-preserving refinement. This enables Parfait to use different techniques to verify the implementation at different levels of abstraction, reuse existing verified components such as CompCert, and automate parts of the proof, while still providing end-to-end guarantees. We use Parfait to verify four HSMs, including an ECDSA certificate-signing HSM and a password-hashing HSM, on top of the OpenTitan Ibex and PicoRV32 processors. Parfait provides strong guarantees for these HSMs: for instance, it proves that the ECDSA-on-Ibex HSM implementation---2,300 lines of code and 13,500 lines of Verilog---leaks nothing more than what is allowed by a 40-line specification of its behavior.
items.abstract_zh: Parfait 是一个框架，用于证明硬件安全模块 (HSM) 的实现不会泄漏任何应用程序规范所规定的内容。 Parfait 证明涵盖了 HSM 的软件和硬件，它捕获了周期级数字电路抽象之上的错误，包括定时侧通道。 Parfait 的贡献是一种可扩展的方法，通过使用中间抽象级别并将它们与传递信息保留细化相关联来证明安全性和无泄漏。这使得 Parfait 能够使用不同的技术来验证不同抽象级别的实现，重用现有的已验证组件（例如 CompCert），并自动化部分证明，同时仍然提供端到端保证。我们使用 Parfait 来验证 OpenTitan Ibex 和 PicoRV32 处理器之上的四个 HSM，包括 ECDSA 证书签名 HSM 和密码散列 HSM。 Parfait 为这些 HSM 提供了强有力的保证：例如，它证明了 ECDSA-on-Ibex HSM 实现（2,300 行代码和 13,500 行 Verilog）不会泄露超过 40 行行为规范所允许的内容。

items.title: Practical Verification of System-Software Components Written in Standard C.
items.abstract: Systems code is challenging to verify, because it uses constructs (like raw pointers, pointer arithmetic, and bit twiddling) that are hard for tools to reason about. Existing approaches either sacrifice programmer friendliness, by demanding significant manual effort and verification expertise, or generality, by restricting the programming language or requiring that the code adapt to the verification tool.
items.abstract_zh: 系统代码很难验证，因为它使用工具难以推理的结构（如原始指针、指针算术和位旋转）。现有方法要么通过要求大量的手动工作和验证专业知识来牺牲程序员的友好性，要么通过限制编程语言或要求代码适应验证工具来牺牲通用性。

items.title: Reducing Energy Bloat in Large Model Training.
items.abstract: Training large AI models on numerous GPUs consumes a massive amount of energy, making power delivery one of the largest limiting factors in building and operating datacenters for AI workloads. However, we observe that not all energy consumed during training directly contributes to end-to-end throughput; a significant portion can be removed without slowing down training. We call this portion energy bloat.
items.abstract_zh: 在众多 GPU 上训练大型人工智能模型会消耗大量能源，这使得电力传输成​​为构建和运营人工智能工作负载数据中心的最大限制因素之一。然而，我们观察到并非训练期间消耗的所有能量都直接有助于端到端吞吐量；可以在不减慢训练速度的情况下删除很大一部分。我们称这部分能量膨胀。

items.title: Dirigent: Lightweight Serverless Orchestration.
items.abstract: While Function as a Service (FaaS) platforms can initialize function sandboxes on worker nodes in 10-100s of milliseconds, the latency to schedule functions in real FaaS clusters can be orders of magnitude higher. The current approach of building FaaS cluster managers on top of legacy orchestration systems (e.g., Kubernetes) leads to high scheduling delays when clusters experience high sandbox churn, which is common for FaaS. Generic cluster managers use many hierarchical abstractions and internal components to manage and reconcile cluster state with frequent persistent updates. This becomes a bottleneck for FaaS since the cluster state frequently changes as sandboxes are created on the critical path of requests. Based on our root cause analysis of performance issues in existing FaaS cluster managers, we propose Dirigent, a clean-slate system architecture for FaaS orchestration with three key principles. First, Dirigent optimizes internal cluster manager abstractions to simplify state management. Second, it eliminates persistent state updates on the critical path of function invocations, leveraging the fact that FaaS abstracts sandbox locations from users to relax exact state reconstruction guarantees. Finally, Dirigent runs monolithic control and data planes to minimize internal communication overheads and maximize throughput. We compare Dirigent to state-of-the-art FaaS platforms and show that Dirigent reduces 99th percentile per-function scheduling latency for a production workload by 2.79× compared to AWS Lambda. Dirigent can spin up 2500 sandboxes per second at low latency, which is 1250× more than Knative.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然功能即服务 (FaaS) 平台可以在 10-100 毫秒内初始化工作节点上的功能沙箱，但在实际 FaaS 集群中调度功能的延迟可能要高出几个数量级。当前在传统编排系统（例如 Kubernetes）之上构建 FaaS 集群管理器的方法，当集群经历高沙箱流失时，会导致较高的调度延迟，这对于 FaaS 来说很常见。通用集群管理器使用许多分层抽象和内部组件来管理和协调集群状态与频繁的持久更新。这成为 FaaS 的瓶颈，因为随着在请求的关键路径上创建沙箱，集群状态经常发生变化。基于对现有 FaaS 集群管理器性能问题的根本原因分析，我们提出了 Dirigent，这是一种用于 FaaS 编排的全新系统架构，具有三个关键原则。首先，Dirigent 优化内部集群管理器抽象以简化状态管理。其次，它消除了函数调用关键路径上的持久状态更新，利用 FaaS 从用户那里抽象出沙箱位置的事实来放松精确的状态重建保证。最后，Dirigent 运行整体控制和数据平面，以最大限度地减少内部通信开销并最大限度地提高吞吐量。我们将 Dirigent 与最先进的 FaaS 平台进行比较，结果表明，与 AWS Lambda 相比，Dirigent 将生产工作负载的每个函数调度延迟降低了 2.79 倍。 Dirigent 每秒可以以低延迟旋转 2500 个沙箱，比 Knative 高出 1250 倍。

items.title: Apparate: Rethinking Early Exits to Tame Latency-Throughput Tensions in ML Serving.
items.abstract: Machine learning (ML) inference platforms are tasked with balancing two competing goals: ensuring high throughput given many requests, and delivering low-latency responses to support interactive applications. Unfortunately, existing platform knobs (e.g., batch sizes) fail to ease this fundamental tension, and instead only enable users to harshly trade off one property for the other. This paper explores an alternate strategy to taming throughput-latency tradeoffs by changing the granularity at which inference is performed. We present Apparate, a system that automatically applies and manages early exits (EEs) in ML models, whereby certain inputs can exit with results at intermediate layers. To cope with the time-varying overhead and accuracy challenges that EEs bring, Apparate repurposes exits to provide continual feedback that powers several novel runtime monitoring and adaptation strategies. Apparate lowers median response latencies by 40.5--91.5% and 10.0--24.2% for diverse CV and NLP classification workloads, and median time-per-token latencies by 22.6--77.9% for generative scenarios, without affecting throughputs or violating tight accuracy constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 推理平台的任务是平衡两个相互竞争的目标：确保给定许多请求的高吞吐量，并提供低延迟响应以支持交互式应用程序。不幸的是，现有的平台旋钮（例如批量大小）无法缓解这种根本性的紧张关系，而只能让用户艰难地用一种属性换取另一种属性。本文探讨了一种通过改变执行推理的粒度来控制吞吐量与延迟之间权衡的替代策略。我们提出了 Apparate，这是一个自动应用和管理 ML 模型中的早期退出 (EE) 的系统，从而某些输入可以在中间层退出并产生结果。为了应对 EE 带来的随时间变化的开销和准确性挑战，Apparate 重新调整了出口的用途，以提供持续的反馈，为多种新颖的运行时监控和适应策略提供支持。 Apparate 将各种 CV 和 NLP 分类工作负载的中值响应延迟降低了 40.5--91.5% 和 10.0--24.2%，将生成场景的每个令牌时间中值延迟降低了 22.6--77.9%，而不影响吞吐量或违反严格的精度约束。

items.title: NOPE: Strengthening domain authentication with succinct proofs.
items.abstract: Server authentication assures users that they are communicating with a server that genuinely represents a claimed domain. Today, server authentication relies on certification authorities (CAs), third parties who sign statements binding public keys to domains. CAs remain a weak spot in Internet security, as any faulty CA can issue a certificate for any domain.
items.abstract_zh: 服务器身份验证可确保用户正在与真正代表所声明域的服务器进行通信。如今，服务器身份验证依赖于证书颁发机构 (CA)，即签署将公钥与域绑定的声明的第三方。 CA 仍然是互联网安全中的一个弱点，因为任何有问题的 CA 都可以为任何域颁发证书。

items.title: DNS Congestion Control in Adversarial Settings.
items.abstract: We instigate the study of adversarial congestion in the context of the Domain Name System (DNS). By strategically choking inter-server channels, this new type of DoS attack can disrupt a large user group's access to target DNS servers at a low cost. In reminiscence of classic network congestion control, we propose a DNS congestion control (DCC) framework as a fundamental yet practical mitigation measure for such attacks. With an optimized fair-queuing message scheduler, DCC ensures benign clients fair access to inter-server channels regardless of an attacker's behavior; with a set of extensible anomaly detection and signaling mechanisms, it minimizes collateral damage to innocuous clients. We architect DCC in a non-invasive style so that it can readily augment existing DNS servers. Our prototype evaluation demonstrates that DCC effectively mitigates adversarial congestion while incurring minor performance overheads.
items.abstract_zh: 我们发起了域名系统（DNS）背景下的对抗性拥塞研究。通过战略性地阻塞服务器间通道，这种新型 DoS 攻击可以以较低的成本破坏大量用户组对目标 DNS 服务器的访问。回顾经典的网络拥塞控制，我们提出了 DNS 拥塞控制（DCC）框架作为此类攻击的基本但实用的缓解措施。通过优化的公平队列消息调度程序，DCC 可确保良性客户端公平访问服务器间通道，而不管攻击者的行为如何；通过一套可扩展的异常检测和信号机制，它可以最大限度地减少对无害客户端的附带损害。我们以非侵入式方式构建 DCC，以便它可以轻松增强现有的 DNS 服务器。我们的原型评估表明，DCC 有效地缓解了对抗性拥塞，同时产生了较小的性能开销。

items.title: Fast, Flexible, and Practical Kernel Extensions.
items.abstract: The ability to safely extend OS kernel functionality is a longstanding goal in OS design, with the widespread use of the eBPF framework in Linux and Windows demonstrating the benefits of such extensibility. However, existing solutions for kernel extensibility (including eBPF) are limited and constrain users either in the extent of functionality that they can offload to the kernel or the performance overheads incurred by their extensions.
items.abstract_zh: 安全扩展操作系统内核功能的能力是操作系统设计的长期目标，eBPF 框架在 Linux 和 Windows 中的广泛使用证明了这种可扩展性的好处。然而，现有的内核可扩展性解决方案（包括 eBPF）是有限的，并且限制了用户可以卸载到内核的功能范围或扩展所产生的性能开销。

items.title: ReCycle: Resilient Training of Large DNNs using Pipeline Adaptation.
items.abstract: Training large Deep Neural Network (DNN) models requires thousands of GPUs over the course of several days or weeks. At this scale, failures are frequent and can have a big impact on training throughput. Utilizing spare GPU servers to mitigate performance loss becomes increasingly costly as model sizes grow. ReCycle is a system designed for efficient DNN training in the presence of failures, without relying on spare servers. It exploits the inherent functional redundancy in distributed training systems - where servers across data-parallel groups store the same model parameters - and pipeline schedule bubbles within each data-parallel group. When servers fails, ReCycle dynamically re-routes microbatches to data-parallel peers, allowing for uninterrupted training despite multiple failures. However, this re-routing can create imbalances across pipeline stages, leading to reduced training throughput. To address this, ReCycle introduces two key optimizations that ensure re-routed microbatches are processed within the original pipeline schedule's bubbles. First, it decouples the backward pass into two phases: one for computing gradients for the input and another for calculating gradients for the parameters. Second, it avoids synchronization across pipeline stages by staggering the optimizer step. Together, these optimizations enable adaptive pipeline schedules that minimize or even eliminate training throughput degradation during failures. We describe a prototype for ReCycle and show that it achieves high training throughput under multiple failures, outperforming recent proposals for fault-tolerant training such as Oobleck and Bamboo by up to 1.46× and 1.64×, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 训练大型深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型需要在几天或几周的时间内使用数千个 GPU。在这种规模下，故障很频繁，并且会对训练吞吐量产生重大影响。随着模型大小的增长，利用备用 GPU 服务器来减轻性能损失的成本越来越高。 ReCycle 是一个专为在出现故障时进行高效 DNN 训练而设计的系统，无需依赖备用服务器。它利用分布式训练系统中固有的功能冗余（其中跨数据并行组的服务器存储相同的模型参数）以及每个数据并行组内的管道调度气泡。当服务器发生故障时，ReCycle 会动态地将微批次重新路由到数据并行对等点，从而在出现多次故障的情况下仍能进行不间断的训练。然而，这种重新路由可能会造成管道阶段之间的不平衡，从而导致训练吞吐量降低。为了解决这个问题，ReCycle 引入了两项关键优化，以确保重新路由的微批次在原始管道计划的气泡内进行处理。首先，它将反向传递分解为两个阶段：一个阶段用于计算输入的梯度，另一个阶段用于计算参数的梯度。其次，它通过错开优化器步骤来避免跨管道阶段的同步。这些优化共同实现了自适应管道调度，可以最大限度地减少甚至消除故障期间的训练吞吐量下降。我们描述了 ReCycle 的原型，并表明它在多次故障下实现了高训练吞吐量，分别比 Oobleck 和 Bamboo 等最新的容错训练方案高出 1.46 倍和 1.64 倍。

items.title: Enabling Parallelism Hot Switching for Efficient Training of Large Language Models.
items.abstract: Training of large-scale deep learning models necessitates parallelizing the model and data across numerous devices, and the choice of parallelism strategy substantially depends on the training workloads such as memory consumption, computation cost, and communication cost. Current approaches generally assume uniform training workloads across samples in a given task. Thus, existing systems are designed to adopt a static parallelism strategy throughout one training process. Nevertheless, when training models with sequence inputs, this assumption fails due to the sequence length variation across samples. Consequently, training with a static parallelism strategy would result in sub-optimal performance.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模深度学习模型的训练需要在众多设备上并行化模型和数据，而并行策略的选择很大程度上取决于训练工作负载，例如内存消耗、计算成本和通信成本。当前的方法通常假设给定任务中的样本具有统一的训练工作量。因此，现有系统被设计为在整个训练过程中采用静态并行策略。然而，当使用序列输入训练模型时，由于样本之间的序列长度变化，这种假设失败。因此，使用静态并行策略进行训练将导致性能次优。

items.title: Autobahn: Seamless high speed BFT.
items.abstract: Today's practical, high performance Byzantine Fault Tolerant (BFT) consensus protocols operate in the partial synchrony model. However, existing protocols are inefficient when deployments are indeed partially synchronous. They deliver either low latency during fault-free, synchronous periods (good intervals) or robust recovery from events that interrupt progress (blips). At one end, traditional, view-based BFT protocols optimize for latency during good intervals, but, when blips occur, can suffer from performance degradation (hangovers) that can last beyond the return of a good interval. At the other end, modern DAG-based BFT protocols recover more gracefully from blips, but exhibit lackluster latency during good intervals. To close the gap, this work presents Autobahn, a novel high-throughput BFT protocol that offers both low latency and seamless recovery from blips. By combining a highly parallel asynchronous data dissemination layer with a low-latency, partially synchronous consensus mechanism, Autobahn (i) avoids the hangovers incurred by traditional BFT protocols and (ii) matches the throughput of state of the art DAG-based BFT protocols while cutting their latency in half, matching the latency of traditional BFT protocols.
items.abstract_zh: 当今实用的高性能拜占庭容错（BFT）共识协议在部分同步模型中运行。然而，当部署确实部分同步时，现有协议效率低下。它们可以在无故障、同步周期（良好的间隔）期间提供低延迟，也可以从中断进度的事件（突发事件）中提供稳健的恢复。一方面，传统的基于视图的 BFT 协议会针对良好间隔期间的延迟进行优化，但是，当出现突发事件时，可能会遭受性能下降（宿醉），这种下降可能会持续到良好间隔返回之后。另一方面，现代基于 DAG 的 BFT 协议可以更优雅地从 blip 中恢复，但在良好的时间间隔内表现出乏善可陈的延迟。为了缩小差距，这项工作提出了 Autobahn，这是一种新颖的高吞吐量 BFT 协议，可提供低延迟和从 blip 中的无缝恢复。通过将高度并行的异步数据传播层与低延迟、部分同步的共识机制相结合，Autobahn (i) 避免了传统 BFT 协议带来的后遗症，并且 (ii) 与最先进的基于 DAG 的 BFT 协议的吞吐量相匹配，同时将其延迟减少了一半，与传统 BFT 协议的延迟相匹配。

items.title: Caribou: Fine-Grained Geospatial Shifting of Serverless Applications for Sustainability.
items.abstract: Sustainability in computing is critical as environmental concerns rise. The cloud industry's carbon footprint is significant and rapidly growing. We show that dynamic geospatial shifting of cloud workloads to regions with lower carbon emission energy sources, particularly for more portable cloud workloads such as serverless applications, has a high potential to lower operational carbon emissions. To make the case, we build a comprehensive framework called Caribou that offloads serverless workflows across geo-distributed regions. Caribou requires no change in the application logic, nor on the provider side. It dynamically determines the best deployment plans, automatically (re-) deploys functions to appropriate regions, and redirects traffic to new endpoints. In reducing operational carbon through fine-grained, function-level offloading, Caribou does not undermine standard metrics such as performance and cost. We show how this approach can reduce the carbon footprint by an average of 22.9% to 66.6% across the North American continent. We demonstrate how a detailed specification of location constraints (e.g., to ensure compliance of one stage) can allow emission reductions for workflows (e.g., by offloading other stages). By showcasing the feasibility of carbon-aware geospatial application deployment, Caribou aims to push the boundaries of system techniques available to curtail cloud carbon emissions and provide a framework for future research.
items.abstract_zh: 随着环境问题的日益严重，计算的可持续性变得至关重要。云行业的碳足迹巨大且快速增长。我们表明，云工作负载动态地理空间转移到碳排放能源较低的地区，特别是对于无服务器应用程序等更便携的云工作负载，具有降低运营碳排放的巨大潜力。为了证明这一点，我们构建了一个名为 Caribou 的综合框架，该框架可以跨地理分布式区域卸载无服务器工作流程。 Caribou 不需要更改应用程序逻辑，也不需要更改提供商端。它动态确定最佳部署计划，自动（重新）将功能部署到适当的区域，并将流量重定向到新端点。通过细粒度、功能级卸载来减少运营碳排放，Caribou 不会破坏性能和成本等标准指标。我们展示了这种方法如何能够将整个北美大陆的碳足迹平均减少 22.9% 至 66.6%。我们演示了位置约束的详细规范（例如，确保一个阶段的合规性）如何能够减少工作流程的排放（例如，通过卸载其他阶段）。通过展示碳感知地理空间应用部署的可行性，Caribou 旨在突破可用于减少云碳排放的系统技术的界限，并为未来的研究提供框架。

items.title: VPRI: Efficient I/O Page Fault Handling via Software-Hardware Co-Design for IaaS Clouds.
items.abstract: Device pass-through has been widely adopted by cloud service providers to achieve near bare-metal I/O performance in virtual machines (VMs). However, this approach requires static pinning of VM memory, making on-demand paging unavailable. The hardware device I/O page fault (IOPF) capability offers an optimal solution to this limitation. Current IOPF approaches, using either standard IOMMU capabilities (ATS+PRI) or devices with independent IOMMU implementations, have not gained widespread adoption in public Infrastructure-as-a-Service clouds. This is due to high costs, platform dependency, and significant impacts on performance and service level objectives (SLOs). We present the Virtualized Page Request Interface (VPRI), a novel IOPF system developed through software-hardware collaboration. VPRI is not only platform-independent, free from address translation complexities, but also cost-effective, and designed to minimize SLO impact. Our work enables large-scale deployment of IOPF capability in Alibaba Cloud with negligible impact on SLOs. When integrated with memory management software, it significantly enhances memory utilization in public IaaS clouds, effectively overcoming the static memory pinning restriction associated with pass-through devices.
items.abstract_zh: 设备直通已被云服务提供商广泛采用，以在虚拟机 (VM) 中实现接近裸机的 I/O 性能。然而，这种方法需要静态固定虚拟机内存，从而导致按需分页不可用。硬件设备 I/O 页面错误 (IOPF) 功能为这一限制提供了最佳解决方案。当前的 IOPF 方法（使用标准 IOMMU 功能 (ATS+PRI) 或具有独立 IOMMU 实现的设备）尚未在公共基础设施即服务云中得到广泛采用。这是由于高成本、平台依赖性以及对性能和服务级别目标 (SLO) 的重大影响。我们提出了虚拟化页面请求接口（VPRI），这是一种通过软件-硬件协作开发的新型 IOPF 系统。 VPRI 不仅独立于平台，没有地址转换复杂性，而且具有成本效益，旨在最大限度地减少 SLO 影响。我们的工作实现了在阿里云中大规模部署 IOPF 能力，并且对 SLO 的影响可以忽略不计。当与内存管理软件集成时，它可以显着提高公共 IaaS 云中的内存利用率，有效克服与直通设备相关的静态内存固定限制。

items.title: Aceso: Achieving Efficient Fault Tolerance in Memory-Disaggregated Key-Value Stores.
items.abstract: Disaggregated memory (DM) has garnered increasing attention due to high resource utilization. Fault tolerance is critical for key-value (KV) stores on DM since machine failures are common in datacenters. Existing KV stores on DM are generally based on replication to achieve fault tolerance, which however suffer from high memory space and performance overheads. In this paper, we investigate the efficiency of different fault-tolerant mechanisms on DM and reveal that checkpointing and erasure coding work best for the index and KV pairs respectively. Based on these observations, we present Aceso, a DM-based KV store that employs a hybrid fault-tolerant mechanism, combining checkpointing for the index and erasure coding for KV pairs. However, applying this hybrid mechanism to DM introduces multiple challenges, i.e., performance interference and data loss of checkpointing, slow space reclamation and failure recovery of erasure coding. To address these challenges, Aceso leverages a differential checkpointing scheme to reduce performance interference incurred by the bandwidth consumption to transmit checkpoints, a versioning approach to recover lost index updates on failures, a delta-based space reclamation mechanism to reclaim obsolete KV pairs with negligible overhead, and a tiered recovery scheme to minimize user disruption. Our experiments show that Aceso simultaneously achieves up to 2.7× throughput improvement, up to 54% tail latency reduction, and 44% memory space savings compared with the state-of-the-art replication-based KV store on DM.
items.abstract_zh: 分解内存（DM）由于资源利用率高而受到越来越多的关注。由于机器故障在数据中心中很常见，因此容错对于 DM 上的键值 (KV) 存储至关重要。 DM上现有的KV存储通常基于复制来实现容错，但内存空间和性能开销较高。在本文中，我们研究了 DM 上不同容错机制的效率，并揭示了检查点和纠删码分别最适合索引和 KV 对。基于这些观察，我们提出了 Aceso，一种基于 DM 的 KV 存储，它采用混合容错机制，结合了索引检查点和 KV 对的纠删码。然而，将这种混合机制应用于DM会带来多重挑战，即检查点的性能干扰和数据丢失、缓慢的空间回收和纠删码的故障恢复。为了应对这些挑战，Aceso 利用差异检查点方案来减少传输检查点的带宽消耗所带来的性能干扰，利用版本控制方法来恢复故障时丢失的索引更新，利用基于增量的空间回收机制来回收过时的 KV 对，而开销可以忽略不计，并利用分层恢复方案来最大限度地减少用户中断。我们的实验表明，与 DM 上最先进的基于复制的 KV 存储相比，Aceso 同时实现了高达 2.7 倍的吞吐量提升、高达 54% 的尾部延迟减少以及 44% 的内存空间节省。

items.title: TrEnv: Transparently Share Serverless Execution Environments Across Different Functions and Nodes.
items.abstract: Serverless computing is renowned for its computation elasticity, yet its full potential is often constrained by the requirement for functions to operate within local and dedicated background environments, resulting in limited memory elasticity. To address this limitation, this paper introduces TrEnv, a co-designed integration of the serverless platform with the operating system and CXL/RDMA-based remote memory pools in two key areas. Firstly, TrEnv introduces repurposable sandboxes, which can be shared across different functions and hence, substantially decrease the overhead associated with creating isolation sandboxes. Secondly, it augments the OS with "memory templates" that enable rapid restoration of function states stored on remote memory. These innovations allow TrEnv to facilitate rapid transitions between instances of different functions and enable memory sharing across multiple nodes. Our evaluations using a variety of representative and real-world workloads demonstrate that TrEnv can initiate a container within 10 milliseconds, achieving up to a 7× speedup in P99 end-to-end latency and reducing memory usage by 48% on average compared to state-of-the-art on-demand restoring systems.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算以其计算弹性而闻名，但其全部潜力往往受到在本地和专用后台环境中运行功能的要求的限制，从而导致内存弹性有限。为了解决这一限制，本文引入了 TrEnv，这是一种在两个关键领域共同设计的无服务器平台与操作系统和基于 CXL/RDMA 的远程内存池的集成。首先，TrEnv 引入了可重新利用的沙箱，可以在不同的功能之间共享，因此大大减少了与创建隔离沙箱相关的开销。其次，它通过“内存模板”增强了操作系统，可以快速恢复存储在远程内存上的功能状态。这些创新使 TrEnv 能够促进不同功能实例之间的快速转换，并实现跨多个节点的内存共享。我们使用各种代表性和真实工作负载进行的评估表明，TrEnv 可以在 10 毫秒内启动容器，与最先进的按需恢复系统相比，P99 端到端延迟实现高达 7 倍的加速，并将内存使用量平均减少 48%。

items.title: Improving DNN Inference Throughput Using Practical, Per-Input Compute Adaptation.
items.abstract: Machine learning inference platforms continue to face high request rates and strict latency constraints. Existing solutions largely focus on compressing models to substantially lower compute costs (and time) with mild accuracy degradations. This paper explores an alternate (but complementary) technique that trades off accuracy and resource costs on a perinput granularity: early exit models, which selectively allow certain inputs to exit a model from an intermediate layer. Though intuitive, early exits face fundamental deployment challenges, largely owing to the effects that exiting inputs have on batch size (and resource utilization) throughout model execution. We present E3, the first system that makes early exit models practical for realistic inference deployments. Our key insight is to split and replicate blocks of layers in models in a manner that maintains a constant batch size throughout execution, all the while accounting for resource requirements and communication overheads. Evaluations with NLP and vision models show that E3 can deliver up to 1.74× improvement in goodput (for a fixed cost) or 1.78× reduction in cost (for a fixed goodput). Additionally, E3's goodput wins generalize to autoregressive LLMs (2.8--3.8×) and compressed models (1.67×).
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习推理平台继续面临高请求率和严格的延迟限制。现有的解决方案主要侧重于压缩模型，以大幅降低计算成本（和时间），同时精度略有下降。本文探讨了一种替代（但互补）的技术，该技术在每个输入粒度上权衡准确性和资源成本：早期退出模型，它有选择地允许某些输入从中间层退出模型。虽然直观，但早期退出面临着基本的部署挑战，这主要是由于退出输入对整个模型执行过程中的批量大小（和资源利用率）产生影响。我们推出 E3，这是第一个使早期退出模型适用于实际推理部署的系统。我们的主要见解是以在整个执行过程中保持恒定批量大小的方式分割和复制模型中的层块，同时考虑资源需求和通信开销。 NLP 和视觉模型的评估表明，E3 可以将有效产出提高 1.74 倍（对于固定成本）或降低 1.78 倍的成本（对于固定有效产出）。此外，E3 的良好产出可推广到自回归 LLM（2.8--3.8×）和压缩模型（1.67×）。

items.title: OZZ: Identifying Kernel Out-of-Order Concurrency Bugs with In-Vivo Memory Access Reordering.
items.abstract: Kernel concurrency bugs are notoriously difficult to identify, while their consequences severely threaten the reliability and security of the entire system. Especially in the kernel, developers should consider not only locks but also memory barriers to prevent out-of-order execution from breaking the correctness of concurrent execution. Incorrect use of memory barriers may cause non-intuitive concurrency bugs that manifest due to out-of-order execution, which we refer to as OoO bugs.
items.abstract_zh: 众所周知，内核并发错误很难识别，但其后果却严重威胁整个系统的可靠性和安全性。尤其是在内核中，开发者不仅要考虑锁，还要考虑内存屏障，以防止乱序执行破坏并发执行的正确性。内存屏障的不正确使用可能会导致由于无序执行而出现的非直观并发错误，我们将其称为 OoO 错误。

items.title: Skyloft: A General High-Efficient Scheduling Framework in User Space.
items.abstract: Skyloft is a general and highly efficient user-space scheduling framework. It leverages user-mode interrupt to deliver and process hardware timers directly in user space. This capability enables Skyloft to achieve μs-scale preemption. Skyloft offers a set of scheduling interfaces that supports different scheduling policies, including both preemptive and nonpreemptive ones. Operating as a user-space scheduling framework, Skyloft is compatible with Linux and integrates seamlessly with high-performance I/O frameworks like DPDK.
items.abstract_zh: Skyloft是一个通用且高效的用户空间调度框架。它利用用户模式中断直接在用户空间中传递和处理硬件定时器。这一能力使得Skyloft能够实现μs级的抢占。 Skyloft提供了一套调度接口，支持不同的调度策略，包括抢占式和非抢占式。 Skyloft 作为用户空间调度框架运行，与 Linux 兼容，并与 DPDK 等高性能 I/O 框架无缝集成。

items.title: Morph: Efficient File-Lifetime Redundancy Management for Cluster File Systems.
items.abstract: Many data services tune and change redundancy configurations of files over their lifetimes to address changes in data temperature and latency requirements. Unfortunately, changing redundancy configs (transcode) is IO-intensive. The Morph cluster file system introduces new transcode-efficient redundancy schemes to minimize overheads as files progress through lifetime phases. For newly ingested data, commonly stored via 3-way replication, Morph introduces a hybrid redundancy scheme that combines a replica with an erasure-coded (EC) stripe, reducing both ingest IO and capacity overheads while enabling free transcode to EC by deleting replicas. For subsequent transcodes to wider, more space-efficient EC configs, Morph exploits Convertible Codes, which minimize data read for EC transcode, and introduces new block placement policies to maximize their effectiveness.
items.abstract_zh: 许多数据服务会在文件的生命周期内调整和更改文件的冗余配置，以应对数据温度和延迟要求的变化。不幸的是，更改冗余配置（转码）是 IO 密集型的。 Morph 集群文件系统引入了新的高效转码冗余方案，以最大限度地减少文件在生命周期阶段中的开销。对于通常通过 3 路复制存储的新摄取数据，Morph 引入了一种混合冗余方案，该方案将副本与纠删码 (EC) 条带相结合，减少摄取 IO 和容量开销，同时通过删除副本实现自由转码到 EC。为了后续转码为更广泛、更节省空间的 EC 配置，Morph 利用可转换代码，最大限度地减少 EC 转码的数据读取，并引入新的块放置策略以最大限度地提高其有效性。

items.title: Fast Core Scheduling with Userspace Process Abstraction.
items.abstract: We introduce uProcess, a pure userspace process abstraction that enables CPU cores to be rescheduled among applications at sub-microsecond timescale without trapping into the kernel. We achieve this by constructing a special privileged mode in userspace to achieve safe and efficient separation among uProcesses. The core idea is a careful combination of two emerging hardware features - userspace interrupts (Uintr) and memory protection keys (MPK). We materialize the uProcess abstraction by implementing Vessel, a userspace core scheduler that colocates latency-critical and best-effort applications with minimal switching overhead when they time-share CPU cores. Our experiment result shows that Vessel exhibits better overall performance and low latency when multiple applications are colocated.
items.abstract_zh: 我们引入了 uProcess，一种纯粹的用户空间进程抽象，它使 CPU 核心能够以亚微秒的时间尺度在应用程序之间重新调度，而不会陷入内核。我们通过在用户空间构建特殊的特权模式来实现 uProcess 之间安全高效的分离来实现这一点。其核心思想是两个新兴硬件功能的精心组合——用户空间中断（Uintr）和内存保护密钥（MPK）。我们通过实现 Vessel 来具体化 uProcess 抽象，Vessel 是一个用户空间核心调度程序，可在分时共享 CPU 核心时以最小的切换开销来并置延迟关键且尽力而为的应用程序。我们的实验结果表明，当多个应用程序共置时，Vessel 表现出更好的整体性能和低延迟。

items.title: Uncovering Nested Data Parallelism and Data Reuse in DNN Computation with FractalTensor.
items.abstract: To speed up computation, deep neural networks (DNNs) usually rely on highly optimized tensor operators. Despite the effectiveness, tensor operators are often defined empirically with ad hoc semantics. This hinders the analysis and optimization across operator boundaries. FractalTensor is a programming framework that addresses this challenge. At the core, FractalTensor is a nested list-based abstract data type (ADT), where each element is a tensor with static shape or another FractalTensor (i.e., nested). DNNs are then de-fined by high-order array compute operators like map/reduce/scan and array access operators like window/stride on FractalTensor. This new way of DNN definition explicitly exposes nested data parallelism and fine-grained data access patterns, opening new opportunities for whole program analysis and optimization. To exploit these opportunities, from the FractalTensor-based code the compiler extracts a nested multi-dimensional dataflow graph called Extended Task Dependence Graph (ETDG), which provides a holistic view of data dependency across different granularity. The ETDG is then transformed into an efficient implementation through graph coarsening, data reordering, and access materialization. Evaluation on six representative DNNs like RNN and FlashAttention on NVIDIA A100 shows that Fractal-Tensor achieves speedup by up to 5.45x and 2.14x on average through a unified solution for diverse optimizations.
items.abstract_zh: 为了加速计算，深度神经网络（DNN）通常依赖于高度优化的张量算子。尽管张量算子很有效，但它们通常是用临时语义根据经验定义的。这阻碍了跨操作员边界的分析和优化。 FractalTensor 是一个解决这一挑战的编程框架。 FractalTensor 的核心是一种基于嵌套列表的抽象数据类型 (ADT)，其中每个元素都是具有静态形状的张量或另一个 FractalTensor（即嵌套）。然后，DNN 由高阶数组计算运算符（如 Map/reduce/scan）和数组访问运算符（如 FractalTensor 上的 window/stride）定义。这种新的 DNN 定义方式明确公开了嵌套数据并行性和细粒度数据访问模式，为整个程序分析和优化开辟了新的机会。为了利用这些机会，编译器从基于 FractalTensor 的代码中提取一个嵌套的多维数据流图，称为扩展任务依赖图 (ETDG)，它提供了跨不同粒度的数据依赖关系的整体视图。然后，通过图粗化、数据重新排序和访问具体化，ETDG 转变为高效的实现。在 NVIDIA A100 上对 RNN、FlashAttention 等六种代表性 DNN 进行评估表明，Fractal-Tensor 通过针对多种优化的统一解决方案，平均加速分别高达 5.45 倍和 2.14 倍。

items.title: Scaling Deep Learning Computation over the Inter-Core Connected Intelligence Processor with T10.
items.abstract: As AI chips incorporate numerous parallelized cores to scale deep learning (DL) computing, inter-core communication is enabled recently by employing high-bandwidth and low-latency interconnect links on the chip (e.g., Graphcore IPU). It allows each core to directly access the fast scratchpad memory in other cores, which enables new parallel computing paradigms. However, without proper support for the scalable inter-core connections in current DL compilers, it is hard for developers to exploit the benefits of this new architecture.
items.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能芯片整合大量并行核心来扩展深度学习 (DL) 计算，最近通过在芯片上采用高带宽和低延迟互连链路（例如 Graphcore IPU）实现了核心间通信。它允许每个内核直接访问其他内核中的快速暂存器存储器，从而实现新的并行计算范例。然而，如果当前深度学习编译器中没有对可扩展内核间连接的适当支持，开发人员就很难利用这种新架构的优势。

items.title: LazyLog: A New Shared Log Abstraction for Low-Latency Applications.
items.abstract: Shared logs offer linearizable total order across storage shards. However, they enforce this order eagerly upon ingestion, leading to high latencies. We observe that in many modern shared-log applications, while linearizable ordering is necessary, it is not required eagerly when ingesting data but only later when data is consumed. Further, readers are naturally decoupled in time from writers in these applications. Based on this insight, we propose LazyLog, a novel shared log abstraction. LazyLog lazily binds records (across shards) to linearizable global positions and enforces this before a log position can be read. Such lazy ordering enables low ingestion latencies. Given the time decoupling, LazyLog can establish the order well before reads arrive, minimizing overhead upon reads. We build two LazyLog systems that provide linearizable total order across shards. Our experiments show that LazyLog systems deliver significantly lower latencies than conventional, eager-ordering shared logs.
items.abstract_zh: 共享日志提供跨存储分片的线性化总顺序。然而，它们在摄取时急切地执行此命令，导致高延迟。我们观察到，在许多现代共享日志应用程序中，虽然线性化排序是必要的，但在摄取数据时并不急切需要，而是在稍后使用数据时才需要。此外，在这些应用程序中，读者自然会在时间上与作者脱钩。基于这一见解，我们提出了 LazyLog，一种新颖的共享日志抽象。 LazyLog 将记录（跨分片）延迟绑定到可线性化的全局位置，并在读取日志位置之前强制执行此操作。这种惰性排序可以降低摄取延迟。考虑到时间解耦，LazyLog 可以在读取到达之前就建立顺序，从而最大限度地减少读取时的开销。我们构建了两个 LazyLog 系统，它们提供跨分片的线性化总顺序。我们的实验表明，LazyLog 系统的延迟明显低于传统的急迫排序共享日志。

items.title: CHIME: A Cache-Efficient and High-Performance Hybrid Index on Disaggregated Memory.
items.abstract: Disaggregated memory (DM) is a widely discussed datacenter architecture in academia and industry. It decouples computing and memory resources from monolithic servers into two network-connected resource pools. Range indexes are widely adopted by storage systems on DM to efficiently locate and query remote data. However, existing range indexes on DM suffer from either high computing-side cache consumption or high memory-side read amplifications. In this paper, we propose CHIME, a hybrid index combining B+ trees with hopscotch hashing, to achieve low cache consumption and low read amplifications simultaneously. There are three challenges in constructing CHIME on DM, i.e., the complicated optimistic synchronization, the extra metadata access, and the read amplifications introduced by hopscotch hashing. CHIME leverages 1) a three-level optimistic synchronization scheme to synchronize read and write operations with various granularities, 2) an access-aggregated metadata management technique to eliminate extra metadata accesses by piggybacking and replicating metadata, and 3) an effective hotness-aware speculative read mechanism to mitigate the read amplifications of hopscotch hashing. Experimental results show that CHIME outperforms the state-of-the-art range indexes on DM by up to 5.1× with the same cache size and achieves similar performance with up to 8.7× lower cache consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 分解内存（DM）是学术界和工业界广泛讨论的数据中心架构。它将计算和内存资源从单一服务器解耦到两个网络连接的资源池中。 DM上的存储系统广泛采用范围索引来高效地定位和查询远程数据。然而，DM 上现有的范围索引要么存在计算端高速缓存消耗较高的问题，要么存在内存端读取放大较高的问题。在本文中，我们提出了 CHIME，一种将 B+ 树与跳房子哈希相结合的混合索引，以同时实现低缓存消耗和低读放大。在 DM 上构建 CHIME 面临三个挑战，即复杂的乐观同步、额外的元数据访问以及跳房子哈希引入的读放大。 CHIME 利用 1) 三级乐观同步方案来同步各种粒度的读写操作，2) 访问聚合元数据管理技术，通过搭载和复制元数据来消除额外的元数据访问，3) 有效的热感知推测读取机制，以减轻跳房子哈希的读取放大。实验结果表明，在相同缓存大小的情况下，CHIME 的性能比 DM 上最先进的范围索引高出 5.1 倍，并在缓存消耗降低 8.7 倍的情况下实现相似的性能。

items.title: SWARM: Replicating Shared Disaggregated-Memory Data in No Time.
items.abstract: Memory disaggregation is an emerging data center architecture that improves resource utilization and scalability. Replication is key to ensure the fault tolerance of applications, but replicating shared data in disaggregated memory is hard. We propose SWARM (Swift WAit-free Replication in disaggregated Memory), the first replication scheme for in-disaggregated-memory shared objects to provide (1) single-roundtrip reads and writes in the common case, (2) strong consistency (linearizability), and (3) strong liveness (wait-freedom). SWARM makes two independent contributions. The first is Safe-Guess, a novel wait-free replication protocol with single-roundtrip operations. The second is In-n-Out, a novel technique to provide conditional atomic update and atomic retrieval of large buffers in disaggregated memory in one roundtrip. Using SWARM, we build SWARM-KV, a low-latency, strongly consistent and highly available disaggregated key-value store. We evaluate SWARM-KV and find that it has marginal latency overhead compared to an unreplicated key-value store, and that it offers much lower latency and better availability than FUSEE, a state-of-the-art replicated disaggregated key-value store.
items.abstract_zh: 内存分解是一种新兴的数据中心架构，可提高资源利用率和可扩展性。复制是确保应用程序容错能力的关键，但在分解内存中复制共享数据很困难。我们提出了 SWARM（分解内存中的 Swift WAit-free Replication），这是分解内存中共享对象的第一个复制方案，以提供（1）常见情况下的单往返读写，（2）强一致性（线性化）和（3）强活跃性（无等待）。 SWARM 做出了两项独立的贡献。第一个是 Safe-Guess，一种新颖的无等待复制协议，具有单次往返操作。第二个是 In-n-Out，这是一种新技术，可在一次往返中提供分类内存中大型缓冲区的条件原子更新和原子检索。使用 SWARM，我们构建了 SWARM-KV，这是一种低延迟、强一致且高度可用的分类键值存储。我们评估了 SWARM-KV，发现与非复制键值存储相比，它具有边际延迟开销，并且比最先进的复制分解键值存储 FUSEE 提供更低的延迟和更好的可用性。

items.title: Efficient Reproduction of Fault-Induced Failures in Distributed Systems with Feedback-Driven Fault Injection.
items.abstract: Debugging a failure usually requires reproducing it first. This can be hard for failures in production distributed systems, where bugs are exposed only by some unusual faulty events. While fault injection testing becomes popular, existing solutions are designed for bug finding. They are ineffective and inefficient to reproduce a specific failure during debugging.
items.abstract_zh: 调试故障通常需要首先重现它。这对于生产分布式系统中的故障来说可能很困难，因为只有一些不寻常的故障事件才会暴露错误。虽然故障注入测试变得流行，但现有的解决方案是为错误查找而设计的。它们在调试过程中重现特定故障的效率低下。

items.title: Reducing Cross-Cloud/Region Costs with the Auto-Configuring MACARON Cache.
items.abstract: An increasing demand for cross-cloud and cross-region data access is bringing forth challenges related to high data transfer costs and latency. In response, we introduce Macaron, an auto-configuring cache system designed to minimize cost for remote data access. A key insight behind Macaron is that cloud cache size is tied to cost, not hardware limits, shifting the way we think about cache design and eviction policies. Macaron dynamically configures cache size and utilizes a mix of cloud storage types to adapt to workload changes and reduce costs. We demonstrate that Macaron reduces cross-cloud workload costs by 65% and cross-region costs by 67%, mainly by reducing outgoing data transfer and by leveraging object storage alongside DRAM to reduce capacity cost.
items.abstract_zh: 跨云、跨区域数据访问的需求不断增长，带来了与高数据传输成本和延迟相关的挑战。为此，我们推出了 Macaron，这是一种自动配置缓存系统，旨在最大限度地降低远程数据访问的成本。 Macaron 背后的一个关键见解是，云缓存大小与成本而不是硬件限制相关，这改变了我们对缓存设计和驱逐策略的思考方式。 Macaron 动态配置缓存大小并利用混合的云存储类型来适应工作负载变化并降低成本。我们证明，Macaron 将跨云工作负载成本降低了 65%，将跨区域成本降低了 67%，这主要是通过减少传出数据传输以及利用对象存储和 DRAM 来降低容量成本。

items.title: SilvanForge: A Schedule-Guided Retargetable Compiler for Decision Tree Inference.
items.abstract: The proliferation of machine learning together with the rapid evolution of the hardware ecosystem has led to a surge in the demand for model inference on a variety of hardware. Decision tree based models are the most popular models on tabular data. This paper is motivated by the problems encountered when targeting inference of these models to run at peak performance on CPU and GPU targets. Existing solutions are neither portable nor achieve the best possible performance for the specific hardware they target. This is because they do not explore and customize optimization configurations to the target processor and the model being used.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习的激增以及硬件生态系统的快速发展导致对各种硬件上的模型推理的需求激增。基于决策树的模型是表格数据上最流行的模型。本文的动机是针对这些模型的推理在 CPU 和 GPU 目标上以峰值性能运行时遇到的问题。现有的解决方案既不便携，也无法为其目标特定硬件实现最佳性能。这是因为他们没有针对目标处理器和正在使用的模型探索和定制优化配置。

items.title: Unearthing Semantic Checks for Cloud Infrastructure-as-Code Programs.
items.abstract: Cloud infrastructures are increasingly managed by Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) frameworks (e.g., Terraform). IaC frameworks enable cloud users to configure their resources in a declarative manner, without having to directly work with low-level cloud API calls. However, with today's IaC tooling, IaC programs that pass the compilation phase may still incur errors at deployment time, resulting in significant disruption. We observe that this stems from a fundamental semantic gap between IaC-level programs and cloud-level requirements---even a syntactically-correct IaC program may violate cloud-level expectations. To bridge this gap, we develop Zodiac, a tool that can unearth IaC-level semantic checks on cloud-level requirements. It provides an automated pipeline to mine these checks from online IaC repositories and validate them using deployment-based testing. We have applied Zodiac to Terraform resources offered by Microsoft Azure---a leading IaC framework and a leading cloud vendor---where it found 500+ semantic checks where violation would produce deployment failures. With these checks, we have identified 200+ buggy Terraform projects and helped fix errors within official Azure provider usage examples.
items.abstract_zh: 云基础设施越来越多地由基础设施即代码 (IaC) 框架（例如 Terraform）进行管理。 IaC 框架使云用户能够以声明式方式配置其资源，而无需直接使用低级云 API 调用。然而，使用当今的 IaC 工具，通过编译阶段的 IaC 程序仍可能在部署时出现错误，从而导致严重中断。我们观察到，这源于 IaC 级程序和云级需求之间的基本语义差距——即使语法正确的 IaC 程序也可能违反云级期望。为了弥补这一差距，我们开发了 Zodiac，这是一种可以挖掘云级需求的 IaC 级语义检查的工具。它提供了一个自动化管道，可以从在线 IaC 存储库中挖掘这些检查，并使用基于部署的测试对其进行验证。我们已将 Zodiac 应用于 Microsoft Azure（领先的 IaC 框架和领先的云供应商）提供的 Terraform 资源，其中发现了 500 多个语义检查，其中违规会导致部署失败。通过这些检查，我们发现了 200 多个有问题的 Terraform 项目，并帮助修复了官方 Azure 提供商使用示例中的错误。

items.title: vSoC: Efficient Virtual System-on-Chip on Heterogeneous Hardware.
items.abstract: Emerging mobile apps such as UHD video and AR/VR access diverse high-throughput hardware devices, e.g., video codecs, cameras, and image processors. However, today's mobile emulators exhibit poor performance when emulating these devices. We pinpoint the major reason to be the discrepancy between the guest's and host's memory architectures for hardware devices, i.e., the mobile guest's centralized memory on a system-on-chip (SoC) versus the PC/server's separated memory modules on individual hardware. Such a discrepancy makes the shared virtual memory (SVM) architecture of mobile emulators highly inefficient.
items.abstract_zh: 超高清视频和 AR/VR 等新兴移动应用可访问各种高吞吐量硬件设备，例如视频编解码器、相机和图像处理器。然而，当今的移动模拟器在模拟这些设备时表现出较差的性能。我们查明了硬件设备的客户和主机内存架构之间的差异，即移动客户在片上系统 (SoC) 上的集中式内存与 PC/服务器在各个硬件上的独立内存模块之间的差异。这种差异使得移动模拟器的共享虚拟内存（SVM）架构效率极低。

items.title: Fast & Safe IO Memory Protection.
items.abstract: IO Memory protection mechanisms prevent malicious and/or buggy IO devices from executing errant transfers into memory. Modern servers achieve this using an IOMMU---IO devices operate on virtual addresses, and IOMMU translates virtual addresses to physical addresses (potentially speeding up translations using a cache called IOTLB) before executing memory transfers. Despite their importance, design of memory protection mechanisms that can provide strong safety properties while achieving high performance has remained elusive. Indeed, recent studies from production datacenters demonstrate that inefficiencies within state-of-the-art memory protection mechanisms result in significant throughput degradation, orders-of-magnitude tail latency inflation, and violation of isolation guarantees.
items.abstract_zh: IO 内存保护机制可防止恶意和/或有错误的 IO 设备向内存执行错误传输。现代服务器使用 IOMMU 来实现这一点——IO 设备在虚拟地址上运行，IOMMU 在执行内存传输之前将虚拟地址转换为物理地址（可能使用称为 IOTLB 的缓存来加速转换）。尽管它们很重要，但能够在实现高性能的同时提供强大的安全特性的内存保护机制的设计仍然难以实现。事实上，最近来自生产数据中心的研究表明，最先进的内存保护机制中的低效率会导致吞吐量显着下降、数量级的尾部延迟膨胀以及违反隔离保证。

items.title: Icarus: Trustworthy Just-In-Time Compilers with Symbolic Meta-Execution.
items.abstract: Just-in-time (JIT) compilers make JavaScript run efficiently by replacing slow JavaScript interpreter code with fast machine code. However, this efficiency comes at a cost: bugs in JIT compilers can completely subvert all language-based (memory) safety guarantees, and thereby introduce catastrophic exploitable vulnerabilities. We present Icarus: a new framework for implementing JIT compilers that are automatically, formally verified to be safe, and which can then be converted to C++ that can be linked into browser runtimes. Crucially, we show how to build a JIT with Icarus such that verifying the JIT implementation statically ensures the security of all possible programs that the JIT could ever generate at run-time, via a novel technique called symbolic meta-execution that encodes the behaviors of all possible JIT-generated programs as a single Boogie meta-program which can be efficiently verified by SMT solvers. We evaluate Icarus by using it to re-implement components of Firefox's JavaScript JIT. We show that Icarus can scale up to expressing complex JITs, quickly detects real-world JIT bugs and verifies fixed versions, and yields C++ code that is as fast as hand-written code.
items.abstract_zh: 即时 (JIT) 编译器通过用快速的机器代码替换缓慢的 JavaScript 解释器代码，使 JavaScript 高效运行。然而，这种效率是有代价的：JIT 编译器中的错误可以完全颠覆所有基于语言（内存）的安全保证，从而引入灾难性的可利用漏洞。我们推出了 Icarus：一个用于实现 JIT 编译器的新框架，该编译器会自动、正式地验证安全，然后可以转换为可以链接到浏览器运行时的 C++。至关重要的是，我们展示了如何使用 Icarus 构建 JIT，以便通过一种称为符号元执行的新技术，静态验证 JIT 实现，确保 JIT 在运行时生成的所有可能程序的安全性，该技术将所有可能的 JIT 生成程序的行为编码为单个 Boogie 元程序，可以通过 SMT 求解器进行有效验证。我们通过使用 Icarus 重新实现 Firefox JavaScript JIT 的组​​件来对其进行评估。我们证明，Icarus 可以扩展以表达复杂的 JIT，快速检测现实世界的 JIT 错误并验证固定版本，并生成与手写代码一样快的 C++ 代码。

items.title: PowerInfer: Fast Large Language Model Serving with a Consumer-grade GPU.
items.abstract: This paper introduces PowerInfer, a high-speed Large Language Model (LLM) inference engine on a personal computer (PC) equipped with a single consumer-grade GPU. The key principle underlying the design of PowerInfer is exploiting the high locality inherent in LLM inference, characterized by a power-law distribution in neuron activation. This distribution indicates that a small subset of neurons, termed hot neurons, are consistently activated across inputs, while the majority, cold neurons, vary based on specific inputs. PowerInfer exploits such an insight to design a GPU-CPU hybrid inference engine: hot-activated neurons are preloaded onto the GPU for fast access, while cold-activated neurons are computed on the CPU, thus significantly reducing GPU memory demands and CPU-GPU data transfers. PowerInfer further integrates adaptive predictors and neuron-aware sparse operators, optimizing the efficiency of neuron activation and computational sparsity. The evaluation shows that PowerInfer significantly outperforms llama.cpp by up to 11.69× while retaining model accuracy across various LLMs (including OPT-175B) on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU. For the OPT-30B model, PowerInfer achieves performance comparable to that of a high-end server-grade A100 GPU, reaching 82% of its token generation rate on a single consumer-grade RTX 4090 GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 PowerInfer，这是一种在配备单个消费级 GPU 的个人计算机 (PC) 上运行的高速大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理引擎。 PowerInfer 设计的关键原则是利用 LLM 推理中固有的高度局部性，其特征是神经元激活中的幂律分布。这种分布表明，一小部分神经元（称为热神经元）在输入之间一致激活，而大多数冷神经元则根据特定输入而变化。 PowerInfer 利用这种洞察力设计了 GPU-CPU 混合推理引擎：热激活神经元被预加载到 GPU 上以便快速访问，而冷激活神经元在 CPU 上计算，从而显着减少 GPU 内存需求和 CPU-GPU 数据传输。 PowerInfer 进一步集成了自适应预测器和神经元感知稀疏算子，优化了神经元激活和计算稀疏性的效率。评估显示，PowerInfer 的性能显着优于 llama.cpp，最高可达 11.69 倍，同时在单个 NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU 上保持各种 LLM（包括 OPT-175B）的模型准确性。对于 OPT-30B 模型，PowerInfer 实现了与高端服务器级 A100 GPU 相当的性能，在单个消费级 RTX 4090 GPU 上达到了其代币生成率的 82%。

items.title: If At First You Don't Succeed, Try, Try, Again...? Insights and LLM-informed Tooling for Detecting Retry Bugs in Software Systems.
Unifying serverless and microservice workloads with SigmaOS.
items.abstract: Many cloud applications use both serverless functions, for bursts of stateless parallel computation, and container orchestration, for long-running microservices and tasks that need to interact. Ideally a single platform would offer the union of these systems' capabilities, but neither is sufficient to act as that single platform: serverless functions are lightweight but cannot act as servers with long-term state, while container orchestration offers general-purpose computation but instance start-up takes too long to support burst parallelism.
items.abstract_zh: 许多云应用程序同时使用无服务器功能（用于突发的无状态并行计算）和容器编排（用于长时间运行的微服务和需要交互的任务）。理想情况下，单一平台可以提供这些系统功能的结合，但这都不足以充当单一平台：无服务器功能是轻量级的，但无法充当具有长期状态的服务器，而容器编排提供通用计算，但实例启动时间太长，无法支持突发并行性。

items.title: Cookie Monster: Efficient On-Device Budgeting for Differentially-Private Ad-Measurement Systems.
items.abstract: With the impending removal of third-party cookies from major browsers and the introduction of new privacy-preserving advertising APIs, the research community has a timely opportunity to assist industry in qualitatively improving the Web's privacy. This paper discusses our efforts, within a W3C community group, to enhance existing privacy-preserving advertising measurement APIs. We analyze designs from Google, Apple, Meta and Mozilla, and augment them with a more rigorous and efficient differential privacy (DP) budgeting component. Our approach, called Cookie Monster, enforces well-defined DP guarantees and enables advertisers to conduct more private measurement queries accurately. By framing the privacy guarantee in terms of an individual form of DP, we can make DP budgeting more efficient than in current systems that use a traditional DP definition. We incorporate Cookie Monster into Chrome and evaluate it on microbenchmarks and advertising datasets. Across workloads, Cookie Monster significantly outperforms baselines in enabling more advertising measurements under comparable DP protection.
items.abstract_zh: 随着主要浏览器中第三方 cookie 的删除以及新的隐私保护广告 API 的引入，研究界有一个及时的机会来协助行业从质量上改善网络隐私。本文讨论了我们在 W3C 社区小组内为增强现有的隐私保护广告测量 API 所做的努力。我们分析了 Google、Apple、Meta 和 Mozilla 的设计，并用更严格、更高效的差分隐私 (DP) 预算组件对其进行了增强。我们的方法称为 Cookie Monster，强制执行明确定义的 DP 保证，并使广告商能够准确地进行更私密的测量查询。通过以个体形式的 DP 来构建隐私保证，我们可以使 DP 预算比使用传统 DP 定义的当前系统更加高效。我们将 Cookie Monster 合并到 Chrome 中，并在微基准和广告数据集上对其进行评估。在所有工作负载中，Cookie Monster 在可比 DP 保护下实现更多广告测量方面显着优于基准。

items.title: Tiered Memory Management: Access Latency is the Key!
items.abstract: The emergence of tiered memory architectures has led to a renewed interest in memory management. Recent works on tiered memory management innovate on mechanisms for access tracking, page migration, and dynamic page size determination; however, they all use the same page placement algorithm---packing the hottest pages in the default tier (one with the lowest hardware-specified memory access latency). This makes an implicit assumption that, despite serving the hottest pages, the access latency of the default tier is less than that of alternate tiers. This assumption is far from real: it is well-known in the computer architecture community that, in the realistic case of multiple in-flight requests, memory access latency can be significantly larger than the hardware-specified latency. We show that, even under moderate loads, the default tier access latency can inflate to be 2.5× larger than the latency of alternate tiers; and that, under this regime, performance of state-of-the-art memory tiering systems can be 2.3× worse than the optimal.
items.abstract_zh: 分层内存架构的出现引起了人们对内存管理的新兴趣。最近有关分层内存管理的工作在访问跟踪、页面迁移和动态页面大小确定机制上进行了创新；然而，它们都使用相同的页面放置算法——将最热的页面打包在默认层（具有最低硬件指定内存访问延迟的层）。这做出了一个隐含的假设：尽管提供最热的页面，但默认层的访问延迟小于备用层的访问延迟。这种假设远非真实：计算机体系结构社区众所周知，在多个正在进行的请求的实际情况下，内存访问延迟可能明显大于硬件指定的延迟。我们表明，即使在中等负载下，默认层访问延迟也可能比备用层的延迟高出 2.5 倍；并且，在这种情况下，最先进的内存分层系统的性能可能比最佳性能差 2.3 倍。

items.title: Tenplex: Dynamic Parallelism for Deep Learning using Parallelizable Tensor Collections.
items.abstract: Deep learning (DL) jobs use multi-dimensional parallelism, i.e., combining data, model, and pipeline parallelism, to use large GPU clusters efficiently. Long-running jobs may experience changes to their GPU allocation: (i) resource elasticity during training adds or removes GPUs; (ii) hardware maintenance may require redeployment on different GPUs; and (iii) GPU failures force jobs to run with fewer devices. Current DL frameworks tie jobs to a set of GPUs and thus lack support for these scenarios. In particular, they cannot change the multi-dimensional parallelism of an already-running job in an efficient and model-independent way.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 作业使用多维并行性，即结合数据、模型和管道并行性，以有效地使用大型 GPU 集群。长时间运行的作业可能会经历 GPU 分配的变化：(i) 训练期间的资源弹性会添加或删除 GPU； (ii) 硬件维护可能需要在不同的 GPU 上重新部署； (iii) GPU 故障迫使作业使用更少的设备运行。当前的深度学习框架将作业与一组 GPU 绑定在一起，因此缺乏对这些场景的支持。特别是，它们无法以高效且独立于模型的方式更改已运行作业的多维并行性。

items.title: LoongServe: Efficiently Serving Long-Context Large Language Models with Elastic Sequence Parallelism.
items.abstract: The context window of large language models (LLMs) is rapidly increasing, leading to a huge variance in resource usage between different requests as well as between different phases of the same request. Restricted by static parallelism strategies, existing LLM serving systems cannot efficiently utilize the underlying resources to serve variable-length requests in different phases. To address this problem, we propose a new parallelism paradigm, elastic sequence parallelism (ESP), to elastically adapt to the variance across different requests and phases. Based on ESP, we design and build LoongServe, an LLM serving system that (1) improves computation efficiency by elastically adjusting the degree of parallelism in real-time, (2) improves communication efficiency by reducing key-value cache migration overhead and overlapping partial decoding communication with computation, and (3) improves GPU memory efficiency by reducing key-value cache fragmentation across instances. Our evaluation under diverse real-world datasets shows that LoongServe improves the throughput by up to 3.85× compared to chunked prefill and 5.81× compared to prefill-decoding disaggregation.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的上下文窗口正在快速增加，导致不同请求之间以及同一请求的不同阶段之间的资源使用情况存在巨大差异。受静态并行策略的限制，现有的LLM服务系统无法高效利用底层资源来服务不同阶段的变长请求。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的并行范例，即弹性序列并行（ESP），以弹性地适应不同请求和阶段之间的差异。基于 ESP，我们设计并构建了 LoongServe，一个 LLM 服务系统，它（1）通过实时弹性调整并行度来提高计算效率，（2）通过减少键值缓存迁移开销和与计算重叠的部分解码通信来提高通信效率，以及（3）通过减少跨实例的键值缓存碎片来提高 GPU 内存效率。我们在不同的真实数据集下的评估表明，与分块预填充相比，LoongServe 将吞吐量提高了 3.85 倍，与预填充解码分解相比，吞吐量提高了 5.81 倍。

items.title: BIZA: Design of Self-Governing Block-Interface ZNS AFA for Endurance and Performance.
items.abstract: All-flash array (AFA) has become one of the most popular storage forms in diverse computing domains. While traditional AFA implementations adopt the block interface to seamlessly integrate with most existing software, this interface hinders the host from managing SSD internal tasks explicitly, which results in both short endurance and poor performance. In comparison, ZNS AFA, such as RAIZN, adopts ZNS SSDs and exposes the ZNS interface to the users. This solution attempts to raise the level of responsibility for SSD management. Unfortunately, it faces severe compatibility issues as most upper-layer software only takes block I/O accesses for granted.
items.abstract_zh: 全闪存阵列（AFA）已成为各种计算领域中最流行的存储形式之一。虽然传统的 AFA 实现采用块接口与大多数现有软件无缝集成，但该接口阻碍主机显式管理 SSD 内部任务，从而导致耐用性短且性能差。相比之下，ZNS AFA，例如RAIZN，采用ZNS SSD并将ZNS接口暴露给用户。该解决方案试图提高SSD管理的责任级别。不幸的是，它面临着严重的兼容性问题，因为大多数上层软件只将块 I/O 访问视为理所当然。

items.title: FBDetect: Catching Tiny Performance Regressions at Hyperscale through In-Production Monitoring.
items.abstract: This paper presents Meta's FBDetect system, which advances the state of the art in performance regression detection by catching regressions as small as 0.005% in noisy production environments. FBDetect monitors around 800,000 time series covering various types of metrics (e.g., throughput, latency, CPU and memory usage) to detect regressions caused by code or configuration changes in hundreds of services running on millions of servers. FBDetect introduces advanced techniques to capture stack traces fleet-wide, measure fine-grained subroutine-level performance differences, filter out deceptive false-positive regressions, deduplicate correlated regressions, and analyze root causes. Beyond these individual techniques, a key strength of FBDetect over prior work is its battle-tested robustness, proven by seven years of production use, and each year catching regressions that would have wasted millions of servers if left undetected.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Meta 的 FBDetect 系统，该系统通过在嘈杂的生产环境中捕获小至 0.005% 的回归，推进了性能回归检测的最新技术。 FBDetect 监控大约 800,000 个时间序列，涵盖各种类型的指标（例如吞吐量、延迟、CPU 和内存使用情况），以检测数百万台服务器上运行的数百个服务的代码或配置更改引起的回归。 FBDetect 引入了先进的技术来捕获整个队列的堆栈跟踪、测量细粒度的子例程级性能差异、过滤掉欺骗性的误报回归、删除重复的相关回归以及分析根本原因。除了这些单独的技术之外，FBDetect 相对于之前的工作的一个关键优势是其经过实战考验的稳健性，这已通过七年的生产使用证明，并且每年都会捕获回归，如果不及时发现，这些回归将浪费数百万台服务器。
